events.description: Join Solely Committed Co. for a evening session of yoga in the park. Each session is community offerings and donations are accepted. Please reach out to @breathewithraven for any additional information.

events.title: Mindset x Movement: Run Into The New Season
events.description: Join a curated running collective for an invigorating morning that perfectly balances mindful movement with the fresh energy of a new season. This isn't just another group run—it's your invitation to connect with like-minded souls while setting intentions that will carry you beautifully into what's next.

events.title: Girls Paint at the Park
events.description: Elevated outdoor paint experience with mocktails and a floral bar.

events.title: Yoga In the Park
events.description: Join Solely Committed Co. for a evening session of yoga in the park. Each session is community offerings and donations are accepted. Please reach out to @breathewithraven for any additional information.

events.title: Plant Bingo
events.description: Get ready for the most delightfully unexpected evening where your love for greenery meets the thrill of bingo in Vegas' coziest plant haven. This isn't your grandmother's bingo night – it's where plant parents and curious souls gather for an evening of friendly competition, botanical prizes, and the kind of authentic connections that make this city feel like home.

events.title: Saturno Pilates
events.description: This isn't your typical studio session—it's a transformative Pilates experience set against the eclectic backdrop of Electric Mushroom, where wellness meets Vegas' creative underground. Trust us when we say this fusion of mindful movement and artistic atmosphere will leave you feeling both centered and inspired in ways you never expected.

events.title: The Zodiac Series: Aries Pilates
events.description: Channel your fiery Aries energy with an invigorating Pilates session designed specifically for the bold and determined ram, set against the stunning backdrop of BLVD Rooftop. This celestial-inspired workout combines the intensity Aries craves with mindful movement that will leave you feeling as powerful and radiant as the stars themselves.

events.title: Yoga In the Park
events.description: Join Solely Committed Co. for a evening session of yoga in the park. Each session is community offerings and donations are accepted. Please reach out to @breathewithraven for any additional information.

events.title: Rooftop Soundbath & Yoga
events.description: Picture yourself flowing through gentle yoga poses as the sun sets over the Vegas skyline, then melting into pure bliss during a healing soundbath under the stars. This rooftop sanctuary experience combines movement, meditation, and those magical desert views that make you feel like you've discovered the city's best-kept wellness secret.

events.title: Restore & Replenish Retreat
events.description: A full women's wellness retreat focused on reconnecting with self.

events.title: Skye Canyon Pickleball Social
events.description: Whether you're curious about the fastest-growing sport in America or ready to compete, this community gathering offers the perfect introduction to pickleball with free clinics, novice and intermediate tournaments, plus food trucks to fuel the fun. It's that rare event where you can learn something new, break a sweat, and connect with fellow Las Vegans all in one beautiful morning at the park.
